series_metadata.series_title: Confirmations of collateral pledged by depository banks to trustees
series_metadata.series_description: The Ohio Pooled Collateral System banks pledge required collateral to the Treasurer at a qualified trustees pursuant to R.C. Chapter 135. Trustees then send a confirmation of the receipt of such pledge directly to the Treasurer. The confirmation generally includes a description of the pledged security, the amount of the security, maturity date, interest rate, and names of the pledgor and pledgee.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: duration that collateral remains pledged and active. Further, conclusion of fiscal year in which collateral is released, an additional 4 fiscal years
